_readme: HOW TO ADD A TRAINING VIDEO — this object is ignored by the app, it is documentation only
_steps: 1. Go to the YouTube video and copy the URL, e.g. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pWsZNV-XOfk
2. The video ID is the part after '?v=' — in this example: pWsZNV-XOfk
3. Copy one of the video entries below and paste it at the end of the list (before the closing ])
4. Fill in: id (unique slug), title, description, youtubeId, category, date (YYYY-MM-DD)
5. category can be a single string or an array — all listed categories appear as badges and the video shows under any matching filter
6. Commit and push this file — changes go live immediately (no code deploy needed)

_example.title: Your Video Title
_example.description: A short sentence or two about what this video covers.

_notes: category: can be a single string ('Warehouse') or an array (['Warehouse', 'Sales']) — all listed categories appear as badges and the video shows under any matching filter.
tags (optional array): hidden search keywords — not displayed anywhere, but users can find the video by searching for them. e.g. ['navigation', 'user roles', 'barcode']
isNew (optional boolean): set to true to show a 'New' badge over the video thumbnail. Remove or set to false once the video is no longer new.

youtubeId: any value starting with 'PLACEHOLDER' will render a Coming Soon overlay and disable clicking. Replace it with the real YouTube video ID when the video is ready and the Coming Soon state will disappear automatically.

title: Session 1: System Foundations
description: An introduction to Flex for all users — navigation, user roles, key settings, item types, and the basic workflow from Quote to Return.

title: Session 2: Inventory & Warehouse Operations
description:
Session 2 covers Inventory & Warehouse Operations.

Training Topics:
Inventory structure (tree, presets, models, units)
Availability tracking & conflicts
Check-out / check-in workflows
Transfers between locations
Barcode scanning
Damage, loss, and maintenance tracking

Outcome:
Staff can confidently manage physical inventory in the system.

title: Session 3: Quoting & Sales Workflow
description:
Session 3 covers Quoting & Sales Workflow.

Training Topics:
— Creating Quotes
— Pricing (Pricing Models, Discounts, Sales Tax)
— Availability-aware quoting
— Converting Quotes to Pull Sheets
— Customer management
— Flag a Quote as ready to invoice

Outcome:
Sales reps can efficiently generate accurate, professional quotes.

title: Session 4: Order Execution & Lifecycle Management
description: Coming soon — managing orders from confirmation through delivery, scanning, and return.

title: Session 5: Inventory & Staffing Logistics
description: Coming soon — coordinating inventory availability, staff assignments, and logistics planning.

title: Session 6: Invoicing, Payments & Accounting
description: Coming soon — generating invoices, processing payments, and managing your accounting workflow in Flex.

title: Session 7: Reporting & Business Insights
description: Coming soon — built-in reports, custom report building, and using dashboards to drive business decisions.

title: Session 8: System Configuration & Administration
description: Coming soon — configuring Flex for your organization, managing settings, and system administration.

title: Session 9: Advanced System Configuration
description: Coming soon — advanced configuration topics, custom fields, integrations, and power-user settings.

title: Session 10: RFID & Concluding Q&A
description: Coming soon — RFID setup and workflows, plus a live Q&A wrapping up the 10-week training series.
